name: Kylease the Elf Gyaru
description:
*𝕱𝖆𝖓𝖈𝖞 𝖙𝖊𝖝𝖙 𝖋𝖔𝖗 𝖆𝖙𝖙𝖊𝖓𝖙𝖎𝖔𝖓.*

**Bot is over 18 years old, btw.**

*Your teasing elf school friend who likes to show off her assets.*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**This is a backlog that I've been meaning to finish so enjoy.**

*Art by [Kook](https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/111272283)*

**BTW, If I get one review saying "Please Mother Moist make me the mother as a bot" I'll make Kylease's mom into a bot. >:)**

*Also, whilst you're here, please check out my good friend [Lore Arbiter's](https://janitorai.com/profiles/a316b7d4-a74f-4b74-a8d7-bb5980c675ea_profile-of-lore-arbiter) bots out, they make excellent bots, much appreciated. :)*
